summary: High‑energy fall‑83 performance praised from “Cold Rain” through “Revolution”, captured on an unknown source with no specific recording complaints.
review: Both reviewers rave about the show’s excitement, noting the band’s high energy in the autumn of ’83 and highlighting standout moments from Cold Rain to Revolution. No concrete details are given about the tape source or sound quality, so the recording is treated as an undefined but listenable capture.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments on performance outweigh the lack of recording details; weighted rating (70% show, 30% recording) yields a solid above‑average score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviews do not mention any specific sound quality issues or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe a consistently high‑energy flow from the opening “Cold Rain” through to the closing “Revolution”, indicating a tight, engaging set.
